privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a synthetically generated Webots world containing a balancing robot named 'SEGWAY_ROBOT'. The required physical properties (mass of 45.5, center of mass at [0, 0, 0.15]) and sensor parameters (encoder resolution of 0.001534, gyro noise of 0.005) exactly match the explicit instructions provided in the task description and are dynamically enforced via the verifier logic. The expected output path is /home/ga/Desktop/segway_calibrated.wbt.
